settings.question: Description
settings.answer:
Falooda Protein brings the nostalgia of falooda to modern nutrition.

Each scoop delivers 21g of pure whey isolate with the rich taste of rose, cardamom, and pistachio — crafted for easy digestion, clean energy, and real results.

A protein shake that finally tastes as good as it feels

settings.question: How to Use
settings.answer:
1. Add 1 scoop (33g) of Falooda Protein to 250 ml of cold milk or water.

2. Shake or blend well until smooth and creamy.
Enjoy it post-workout for recovery or anytime during the day as a nourishing snack or meal boost.

💡 Tip: Mix it with chilled milk for a rich falooda-like experience, or blend with oats, banana, or ice for a thicker shake.

settings.question: Ingredients
settings.answer:
Whey Protein (90%), Natural Rose Extract, Cardamom Extract, Vanilla Flavor, Digestive Enzyme Blend, Natural Sweetener (Stevia), Stabilizers, and Flavor Enhancers (Natural Origin).

  • No Artificial Colors
  • No Added Preservatives
  • Just 2g Total Sugar per Serving

settings.question: Lab-Tested for Heavy Metals & Lead
settings.answer: Each batch verified for safety and quality.

settings.question: Balanced Flavor, Smart Sweetness
settings.answer: Crafted with natural and select artificial flavors for rich taste.

settings.question: Is Falooda Whey suitable for vegetarians?
settings.answer: Yes, it’s made from dairy-based whey protein, 100% vegetarian-friendly.

settings.question: Does it contain artificial flavors or colors?
settings.answer: Falooda Protein uses a blend of natural and carefully selected artificial flavors to achieve its signature taste, ensuring every scoop mixes smoothly and tastes just right. We also use stevia and sucralose for balanced sweetness, keeping sugar content to only 2g per serving.

settings.question: How should I use it?
settings.answer: Mix one scoop with 250 ml milk or water, shake well, and enjoy post-workout or anytime during the day.

settings.question: Will it cause bloating?
settings.answer: Our formula includes digestive enzymes for smooth digestion and no bloating.

settings.question: Is it lab-tested?
settings.answer: Every batch is third-party tested for purity, heavy metals, and nutritional accuracy.

settings.question: Can I return it if I don’t like it?
settings.answer: Yes, our 30-Day Feel-Good Guarantee ensures a full refund, no questions asked.
